human_verification.notes: Reviewed child-care-specific licensing boundaries, evidence handling, corrective-action packaging, scenario-to-ability coverage, and refusal of legal and regulator-facing authority.

review_notes: All required scenario families for the issue and cross-industry research contract are covered and mapped to passing results.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls restrict the lane to child-care-specific licensing evidence, monitoring, remediation, and escalation support only.

Scenario set covers missing evidence, conflicting policy or regulator sources, legal or signoff requests, tenant fact gaps, and industry-specific refusal behavior.
Runtime remains specification-based with explicit promotion requirements for any later retained-implementation transition.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; jurisdiction and provider-type differences are explicitly handled through runtime retrieval and escalation rules.
This package is ready for validated operations under specification-based execution controls.
